column1: # conversion-table.tsv - LaTeX <-> Unicode conversion table for org.jabref.latexconv
# Generated by tools/GenerateTable.java. Do not edit by hand; re-run the generator instead.
#   category: one of letters, diacritics, superscripts, subscripts, greek, symbols, styles
#   unicode:  literal character(s); combining marks/whitespace/non-printables are escaped as
#             ~U+XXXX (may be mixed with literal characters in the same value)
#   latex:    full LaTeX replacement text verbatim (e.g. \alpha, \", \textsuperscript{t},
#             \mathbb{A}, \frac{1}{2}); for `combining` rows this is the bare accent command
#   flags:    comma-separated subset of decode-only, encode-only, alt, combining, math, script
#             the FIRST row (file order) for a given unicode value that lacks both alt and
#             decode-only is THE encode-preferred row for that value; there is at most one
#             such row per distinct unicode value
# Rows are sorted by category (alphabetically), then by the unicode value's first codepoint,
# then by latex text, then by flags - deterministic and reproducible across runs.
# Derived from, in order of encode priority (Biber wins ties, then tomtung, then JabRef):
#  - Biber, lib/Biber/LaTeX/recode_data.xml, submodule tools/upstream/biber pinned at commit
#    Style}.scala, submodule tools/upstream/latex2unicode pinned at commit
#    License: MIT. Parts of that table derive from ISO 8879 entity definitions.
# See tools/CONFLICTS.md for every merge conflict and skipped/non-representable entry.

column2:
\textquotedbl	decode-only
symbols	#	\#	decode-only
symbols	$	\$	decode-only
symbols	$	\textdollar	decode-only
symbols	%	\%	decode-only

symbols	&	\&	decode-only
symbols	&	\textampersand	decode-only
symbols	'	\textquotesingle	decode-only
symbols	*	\textasteriskcentered	decode-only
symbols	:	\colon	
symbols	<	\textless	decode-only
symbols	=	\textequals	decode-only
symbols	>	\textgreater	decode-only
symbols	[	\lbrack	decode-only
symbols	\	\backslash	decode-only
symbols	\	\textbackslash	decode-only
symbols	]	\rbrack	decode-only
symbols	^	\textasciicircum	encode-only,decode-only
symbols	_	\_	decode-only
symbols	_	\textunderscore	decode-only
symbols	`	\textasciigrave	encode-only,decode-only
symbols	g	\textg	decode-only
symbols	{	\textbraceleft	encode-only,decode-only
symbols	{	\{	decode-only
symbols	|	\textbar	decode-only
symbols	}	\textbraceright	encode-only,decode-only
symbols	}	\}	decode-only
symbols	~	\textasciitilde	encode-only,decode-only
symbols	~U+0091	`	
symbols	~U+0092	'	
symbols	~U+0093	``	
symbols	~U+0094	''	
symbols	~U+0096	--	encode-only
symbols	 	\nobreakspace	decode-only
symbols	 	~	decode-only
symbols	¡	\textexclamdown	
symbols	¢	\textcent
